title: agrostis decaryana
intro: Agrostis decaryana, also known as Agrostis capillaris subsp. decaryana, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Agrostis in the family Poaceae. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Agrostis decaryana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated tissues and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Agrostis decaryana may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
